description.list.message: Use your own service provider API Key (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Zhiyu) instead of the platform account pool. After configuration, the dialogue requests for the corresponding model will directly call the upstream service provider with your Key, not consuming platform Credits; tool calls, references, artifacts, cloud history, and other functions will work as usual.

field.apiKeyEditPlaceholder.message: Leave blank to keep current Key unchanged

field.baseUrlPlaceholder.message: Leave blank to use provider's default address

message.deleteConfirm.message: Confirm deletion of this API Key? Subsequent {provider} model dialogues will revert to the platform's default upstream.

message.empty.message: No custom API Key configured yet. Click "Add API Key" to use your own service provider account.

message.baseUrlHelp.message: Optional. Custom upstream address (for OpenRouter, self-built reverse proxy, enterprise gateway, etc.). Only HTTPS is allowed, cannot point to internal network/loopback addresses.

badge.tooltip.message: This dialogue uses your own {provider} API Key, costs will be settled by your {provider} account, and will not deduct from platform balance.

badge.manage.message: Click to manage your custom API Key
badge.manage.description: Prompt after clicking the BYOK badge on the chat page: Click to open the API Key tab in the settings dialog.

button.testConnection.description: Button in the add/edit dialog - first save the credentials, then call upstream /models to verify connectivity.

test.success.description: Success title in the connectivity test result area.

test.failure.description: Failure title in the connectivity test result area.

test.endpoint.description: Label for the request URL in the test result details.

test.status.description: Label for the HTTP status code in the test result details.

test.message.description: Label for upstream error/message text in the test result details.

providerDesc.openai.message: Replace the site's ChatGPT (GPT-4 / GPT-4o / o1 / o3, etc.) dialogue requests.
providerDesc.openai.description: Subtitle for the OpenAI option in the provider dropdown.

providerDesc.anthropic.message: Replace the site's Claude (Sonnet / Opus / Haiku, etc.) dialogue requests.
providerDesc.anthropic.description: Subtitle for the Anthropic option in the provider dropdown.

providerDesc.google.message: Replace the site's Gemini (Pro / Flash series) dialogue requests.
providerDesc.google.description: Subtitle for the Google option in the provider dropdown.

providerDesc.xai.message: Replace the site's Grok dialogue requests.
providerDesc.xai.description: Subtitle for the xAI option in the provider dropdown.

providerDesc.deepseek.message: Replace the site's DeepSeek (V3 / R1, etc.) dialogue requests.
providerDesc.deepseek.description: Subtitle for the DeepSeek option in the provider dropdown.

providerDesc.moonshot.message: Replace Kimi conversation requests on this site.
providerDesc.moonshot.description: Subtitle for the Moonshot (Kimi) option in the provider dropdown.

providerDesc.zhipu.message: Replace the site's GLM series dialogue requests.
providerDesc.zhipu.description: Subtitle for the Zhipu (GLM) option in the provider dropdown.
